dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Another transfer. Another new school. Another fresh start.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: My dad's job in the military means moving around is just... normal for me now. I've learned not to get too attached, not to expect too much.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: This time, it's Baekyeon Girls' High School. Supposedly one of the best.

dialogue.speaker: HOMEROOM TEACHER
dialogue.line: Alright, everyone, settle down. We have a new student joining us today.

dialogue.speaker: HOMEROOM TEACHER
dialogue.line: Come on in, Sung Su-ji.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: Hello. I'm Sung Su-ji. Please take care of me.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (A quick scan of the room. Twenty-five girls. All eyes on me. Some curious, some indifferent. A few even smiling. Seems normal enough.)

dialogue.speaker: HOMEROOM TEACHER
dialogue.line: Su-ji, you can take the empty seat in the back, next to Myung Ja-eun.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: Thank you.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SHUFFLE

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (The girl next to me, Ja-eun, doesn't even look up. Her hair covers most of her face. She seems... quiet.)

dialogue.speaker: CLASSMATE 1
dialogue.line: Psst, did you see her bag? It's pretty nice.

dialogue.speaker: CLASSMATE 2
dialogue.line: Yeah, but she looks a bit plain, doesn't she?

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Already being judged. Standard. Just keep a low profile.)

dialogue.speaker: Baek Ha-rin
dialogue.line: Welcome, Su-ji. I'm Baek Ha-rin. If you need anything, just ask.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: Thank you, Ha-rin.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Baek Ha-rin. The 'it' girl, clearly. Prettiest, most confident, surrounded by a small entourage. Her smile doesn't quite reach her eyes.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BELL RINGS

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: Lunchtime already? This day is flying by.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Everyone's heading to the cafeteria. Ja-eun is still just sitting there. Alone.)

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: Hey, Ja-eun. Aren't you coming?

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (She just shakes her head slightly, not looking at me. Okay, then.)

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Later that day, just before dismissal. The teacher hands out small tablets.)

dialogue.speaker: HOMEROOM TEACHER
dialogue.line: Alright, girls. Time for the monthly 'Pyramid Game' vote.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Pyramid Game? What's that?)

dialogue.speaker: HOMEROOM TEACHER
dialogue.line: Remember, you get five votes. Three for A-rank, two for B-rank. You can't vote for yourself. And no abstaining.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: Excuse me, Teacher. What exactly is this 'Pyramid Game'?

dialogue.speaker: HOMEROOM TEACHER
dialogue.line: Ah, Su-ji. Right, you're new. It's a popularity ranking system we have in Class 2-5. Helps us maintain a healthy social environment.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (A popularity contest? In high school? This sounds... dangerous.)

dialogue.speaker: CLASSMATE 3
dialogue.line: Just vote for who you like, Su-ji. It's simple.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (I look at the tablet. A list of names. Myung Ja-eun's name is there. Baek Ha-rin's. Everyone's.)

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (A-rank gets privileges. B-rank is average. C-rank is... less than average. And F-rank... F-rank is the target.)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: TAP TAP TAP

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (I cast my votes, feeling a strange unease. This isn't just a game.)

dialogue.speaker: HOMEROOM TEACHER
dialogue.line: Voting is closed! Let's see the results.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BEEP BOOP

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The projector screen flickers to life, displaying a pyramid with names arranged in tiers.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Baek Ha-rin, top of A-rank, of course. Lim Ye-rim, the idol trainee, right below her. And at the very bottom... F-rank.)

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Myung Ja-eun. She's F-rank. And my name... Sung Su-ji. D-rank.)

dialogue.speaker: CLASSMATE 4
dialogue.line: Look, Ja-eun is F again. No surprise there.

dialogue.speaker: CLASSMATE 5
dialogue.line: And the new girl, D-rank. Not bad for a transfer.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (The bell rings. Everyone packs up. But no one talks to Ja-eun. No one even looks at her.)

dialogue.speaker: Baek Ha-rin
dialogue.line: Oh, Ja-eun. Did you forget your bag? How clumsy.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Ha-rin's foot 'accidentally' trips Ja-eun's bag, sending its contents scattering across the floor.

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (Ja-eun slowly, silently, begins to pick up her things. No one helps. Everyone just watches, some with smirks.)

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (This isn't just a game. This is a hierarchy. And F-rank isn't just unpopular. F-rank is the target. The punching bag.)

dialogue.speaker: Sung Su-ji
dialogue.line: (And I just stepped right into it.)

summary: Sung Su-ji transfers to Baekyeon Girls' High School and is immediately introduced to the 'Pyramid Game,' a monthly popularity vote that determines a student's social ranking, quickly realizing its devastating consequences for the F-rank.
